description_long: This is a classic American muscle coupe car with a long, low-slung body and a pronounced hood scoop, suggesting a high-performance engine beneath. The car features two doors, a hardtop roofline, and a slightly flared rear fender, giving it an aggressive stance. The front end is characterized by a wide grille and dual round headlights, while the rear displays rectangular taillights and a subtle lip on the trunk. The side profile reveals clean lines, flush door handles, and a set of robust wheels with visible wheel arches. The windows are tinted and the interior appears to have bucket seats, typical of performance-oriented coupes. The car is finished in a solid white color with black trim elements, exuding a vintage yet sporty aesthetic.
description: A classic white American muscle coupe with a hood scoop, two doors, and a hardtop roofline, featuring bold lines and vintage styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the coupe's long body, two doors, hood scoop, and black roof trim.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide grille, dual round headlights, and prominent hood scoop.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with clearer visibility of the passenger side details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rectangular taillights, trunk lip, and rear window.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
